ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_year_start" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the client */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the financial data (e.g., Secured Loans, Unsecured Loans, Deposits) */,
  "principal_amount" REAL /* Principal amount of the loan or deposit */,
  "interest_due_but_not_paid" REAL /* Interest due but not paid */,
  "interest_accrued_but_not_due" REAL /* Interest accrued but not due */,
  "total_indebtedness" REAL /* Total indebtedness */,
  "financial_year" TEXT /* Financial year (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the loan or deposit */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in years */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., current, overdue, paid) */,
  "guarantor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guarantor for secured loans */,
  "collateral_description" TEXT /* Description of the collateral for secured loans */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_year_start_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_year_start_guarantor_id FOREIGN KEY ("guarantor_id") REFERENCES guarantors ("guarantor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_year_end" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the client */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the financial data (e.g., Secured Loans, Unsecured Loans, Deposits) */,
  "principal_amount" REAL /* Principal amount of the loan or deposit */,
  "interest_due_but_not_paid" REAL /* Interest due but not paid */,
  "interest_accrued_but_not_due" REAL /* Interest accrued but not due */,
  "total_indebtedness" REAL /* Total indebtedness */,
  "financial_year" TEXT /* Financial year (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the loan or deposit */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in years */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., current, overdue, paid) */,
  "guarantor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guarantor for secured loans */,
  "collateral_description" TEXT /* Description of the collateral for secured loans */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_year_end_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_year_end_guarantor_id FOREIGN KEY ("guarantor_id") REFERENCES guarantors ("guarantor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of the client (e.g., individual, corporation) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "account_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account manager assigned to the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the client */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the client registered with the institution */,
  "risk_rating" TEXT /* Risk rating of the client (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the client */,
  "total_loans" REAL /* Total amount of loans the client has with the institution */,
  "total_deposits" REAL /* Total amount of deposits the client has with the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guarantors" (
  "guarantor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guarantor */,
  "guarantor_name" TEXT /* Name of the guarantor */,
  "guarantor_type" TEXT /* Type of the guarantor (e.g., individual, corporation) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the guarantor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the guarantor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the guarantor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guarantor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the client */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report in a structured format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
